name: Privacy.com
description: Virtual card issuing API and consumer service generating disposable card numbers for merchant-level controls.

seo.title: Privacy.com — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Privacy.com: Virtual card issuing API and consumer service generating disposable card numbers for merchant-level controls.

when_to_use: Generating disposable virtual cards for merchant-level spend control
Preventing subscription abuse with single-use card numbers
Embedding virtual card issuing into fintech expense products

pros: Instant disposable virtual cards via API
Useful for subscription hygiene and vendor limits
cons: Not a payments orchestrator by any real definition
Limited enterprise features vs. Ramp or Brex
review.verdict: Handy US virtual-card tool, but miscategorised here — it is issuing and privacy, not orchestration.
review.best_for: US consumers and small businesses wanting disposable cards with merchant-level controls.
review.not_for: Non-US teams or anyone looking for true multi-PSP payment routing.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
